summary_raw: May 4: S&P 500 down ~10pts (0.13%), Dow down 181pts (0.36%), Nasdaq up ~20pts (0.07%) as Iran tensions spike oil above $113/bbl. May 1: Nasdaq hit new record 25,114.44; S&P 500 closed at 7,230.12. Apple beat Q2 earnings, rose 3%+. Palantir reporting after close. eBay surged ~10% on GameStop $125/share acquisition proposal.
